expected_properties: dout reflects the ROM content at the supplied addr without spurious changes
Repeated reads of the same address produce identical dout values
additional_cases.goal: Validate combinational read consistency for arbitrary address sequences
notes: Leverages the combinational nature of the ROM; no clock or reset needed
Observations are made in the same simulation delta cycle after addr stimulus
preconditions: addr input is driven with a defined 8‑bit value
stimulus_intent: Apply a sequence of address values and verify that dout matches the expected ROM contents
timing_assumptions: Assume zero‑delay combinational propagation; dout can be sampled immediately after addr changes

expected_properties: Address 0x00 yields the ROM entry at index 0
Address 0xFF yields the ROM entry at index 255
additional_cases.goal: Exercise the extreme address values of the ROM address space
notes: Confirms that the address decoder correctly handles the full 8‑bit range
preconditions: addr input can be driven with 0x00 and 0xFF
stimulus_intent: Drive addr with its minimum and maximum possible values and monitor dout
timing_assumptions: Observe dout immediately after each addr stimulus, respecting combinational behavior

expected_properties: dout updates combinationally with any change on addr
Output is deterministic for a given addr value
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Confirm that any address yields a deterministic dout value as defined by the ROM contents
notes: No timing assumptions beyond combinational propagation are made
stimulus_intent: Drive addr with arbitrary values and monitor dout for deterministic response
timing_assumptions: Observe dout in the same delta cycle after addr changes, reflecting combinational logic

expected_properties: Address 0x00 returns the ROM entry at index 0
Address 0xFF returns the ROM entry at index 255
baseline_case_enrichments.goal: Exercise min and max address values to ensure correct ROM indexing
notes: Ensures that the address decoder correctly handles the full 8‑bit range without overflow
stimulus_intent: Apply addr=0x00 and addr=0xFF and verify corresponding dout values
timing_assumptions: Observe dout immediately after each boundary addr stimulus, respecting combinational behavior
